response.justification: Bogdan brings extensive senior-level experience, particularly in developing geospatial data platforms and distributed systems, which directly aligns with the core domain of routing tiling. While his recent language experience leans towards TypeScript/Node.js and Dlang, his prior C/C++ work and system-level programming background suggest a strong foundation. His work on low-latency microservices and a geo-data platform demonstrates relevant skills in data transformation and handling at scale, making him a strong candidate despite some concerns regarding recent C++ proficiency.
strengths: Deep experience with geospatial data platforms and GIS applications.
Proven track record in senior roles, building and operating distributed, low-latency systems.
Strong commitment to quality assurance (TDD, CI/CD) and open-source contributions.
concerns: Limited recent experience with C++ or Rust, which are primary languages for the role.
Experience is more focused on geo-data platforms than explicit "routing" or "navigation guidance solutions" development.
Prior C++ experience is dated (2015), potentially not reflecting modern C++ practices.
